spec.description: Live health and performance monitoring for leeannperugini.com

spec.title: Site Status
spec.description: Is the website reachable right now?

spec.title: VM Disk Usage
spec.description: How full the WordPress server's disk is. Over 80% = time to clean up or expand — new recipe photos add up fast!

spec.title: DNS Lookup Time
spec.description: Time to resolve the domain name. Should always be under 100ms via Cloudflare.

spec.title: TLS Handshake Time
spec.description: Time for the SSL security connection to establish.

spec.title: Last Backup Age
spec.description: Hours since the last successful UpdraftPlus backup. Green = recent, Yellow = getting old, Red = overdue.

spec.title: Plugin Updates
spec.description: Number of WordPress plugins with available updates. Green = all up to date, Red = updates needed.

spec.title: Response Time Breakdown (24h)
spec.description: Where load time is spent: DNS → Connection → TLS → Server Processing → Transfer. Spikes in Server Processing point to WordPress/PHP issues. Spikes in Transfer point to large images.

spec.title: Uptime History
spec.description: Green = site was up, Red = site was down. Any red is worth investigating.

spec.title: Response Time
spec.description: Current page load speed. Green = fast, Yellow = slow, Red = problem.

spec.title: Backup Status
spec.description: Whether the last UpdraftPlus backup completed successfully.

spec.title: WordPress Core Update
spec.description: Whether a WordPress core update is available. Green = up to date, Red = update available.

spec.title: HTTP Status Code
spec.description: 200 = all good. Anything else may indicate a problem.

spec.title: Response Time
spec.description: How fast the site loads. Under 1s = great, over 3s = problem.

spec.title: SSL Certificate
spec.description: Days until the HTTPS certificate expires. Green = fine, Yellow = renew soon, Red = urgent.

spec.title: Uptime — 24 Hours
spec.description: Percentage of health checks that passed in the last 24 hours. Should be 100%.

spec.title: Uptime — 30 Days
spec.description: Percentage of health checks passed over the last 30 days.

spec.title: VM CPU Usage
spec.description: How hard the WordPress server's CPU is working. Sustained high CPU can cause slow page loads — may indicate a runaway plugin or bot traffic.

spec.title: VM Memory Usage
spec.description: How much of the WordPress server's RAM is in use. Over 85% = investigate for memory leaks or resize the VM.

spec.title: leeannperugini.com — Site Health
